---
name: Bug report
about: Something in the skill, validators, installer, or docs is wrong
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

**What happened**
<!-- A clear description of the problem. -->

**Where**
- [ ] Skill behavior (`SKILL.md` / references) — which host? (Claude Code / Codex / Gemini / Cursor / Kimi / GLM)
- [ ] Validator / test / CI
- [ ] Installer (`scripts/install.sh`)
- [ ] Docs (README EN/zh-CN, landing page)

**To reproduce**
<!-- Exact command or the prompt you gave the agent, and what it did. -->

**Expected**
<!-- What you expected instead. -->

**Environment**
- Host + version:
- OS:
- Python (if a validator/installer issue): `python3 --version`
